name: corbis-literature-starter-kit
description: Literature review and idea-screening starter kit for Codex, powered by Corbis MCP. Bundles reusable research skills for literature reviews, positioning, idea generation, citation checks, and literature landscapes.

interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin for literature reviews, idea screening, citation verification, and literature landscapes. Includes six repo-defined skills and Corbis MCP connectivity for academic search and citation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Write a literature review on climate risk and commercial real estate.
Position my paper against the closest literature.
Verify the citations in my BibTeX file.
